note: Per-skill index: for each observed skill/ability, lists every talent that modifies it, where it sits in the tree, its parsed stat modification, and a mock value showing that modification applied to a normalized baseline of 10. Each modifying talent is tagged with one or more lanes from laneTaxonomy (DMG/CRIT/CDR/CAST/HASTE/SPEED/HEAL/SHIELD/MITIGATION/RESOURCE/COST/DURATION/AOE/CC/ARMOR/SUMMON/MISC), plus cross-cutting behavior flags (PROC, STACK) that describe how the effect triggers rather than what stat it touches. A handful of nodes have unresolved "$xx" template descriptions in the source export - these are flagged rather than guessed at.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the effectiveness of your Aegis spells by 30%.
Reduces the cast time of Aeroblast by -0.3 sec.

Your Aeroblast now grants your Air Elemental a stack of Invigoration.
InvigorationIncreases the damage of your Air Elemental by 3% for 15 seconds, stacking 10 times.

Additional applications do not refresh duration.
Increases the spell damage scaling of Shock by 10% and Aeroblast by 20%.

Aerodynamics.baseDescription:
Depletes 40 Static
Envelop party and raid members within 40 yds in magical mist, increasing their attack or spell power by 95 for 15 seconds.

Does not stack with similar effects.

Aether Mastery.baseDescription: Allows 60% of your mana regeneration to continue while casting and increases your critical strike chance by 4%.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the damage dealt by your Air Elemental's spells by 20% and your Nature damage dealt by 4%.
Damage dealt by your Air Elemental now generates you 2 Static.

Your Aeroblast now grants your Air Elemental a stack of Invigoration.
InvigorationIncreases the damage of your Air Elemental by 3% for 15 seconds, stacking 10 times.

Additional applications do not refresh duration.

Depletes 50 Static
Transforms your Air Elemental into a more powerful form for 15 seconds, increasing damage dealt by 25% and spell haste by 30%.

Casting Gale now causes your Air Elemental to cast Gale.

Additionally, you now emanate an aura around you, increasing the Armor of party and raid members by 390.

Does not stack with similar effects.

Casting Kiss of the Clouds now empowers your Air Elemental with Gift of Air for 30 seconds.

In addition, your critical strikes now extend the duration of your Tailwind by 1.5 sec.
Gift of AirIncreases damage dealt by 20%, spell haste by 15%, and heals for 13.75 every 2 sec.
Casting Updraft will now cause your Air Elemental to cast its own Updraft beneath you.
Command your Air Elemental to windsurf to you, intercepting the next melee or ranged attack made against you, and allowing you to cast Shock and Call Lightning while moving for 15 seconds.

Depletes 10 Static
Command your Air Elemental, causing its next instance of damage to unleash a flurry of air on your target, dealing 763 + 140% nature SP Nature damage over 21 seconds, and reducing their resistances by 75, and increasing their Magic damage taken by -2%.

Your damage dealt now increases the haste of your Air Elemental by 1% for 10 seconds, stacking 5 times.

Damage dealt by your Air Elemental now increases your haste by 1% for 10 seconds, stacking 5 times.

Depletes 40 Static
Command your Air Elemental, causing its next instance of damage within 8 seconds to strike an enemy, dealing 1349 + 100% arcane SP Nature damage and increasing the movement speed of all nearby allies by 30% for 15 seconds.

Airing Out.baseDescription: Reduces the duration of incapacitate and disorient effects by -20%.

Arcane Lightning.baseDescription: Increases your Intellect and Spirit by 5%.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the damage of your Arm of Thorim by an additional 1% per Static depleted.
Your Arm of Thorim now leaves unstable electricity beneath the target, dealing damage equal to 10% of its damage dealt to enemies within every 1 sec for 3 seconds.
Increases the critical strike chance of Call Lightning and Arm of Thorim by 30% against targets affected by your Volt.
Increases the damage of your Shock, Call Lightning, and Arm of Thorim by 20%.
Increases the spell power scaling of Shock, Call Lightning, and Arm of Thorim by 30%.
Damage dealt by Electrocute and Arm of Thorim now increase the target's chance to be critically hit by spells by 3% for 10 seconds.
Casting Call Lightning or Electrocute now reduces the cooldown of Arm of Thorim and Lightning Cage by -1.5 sec.

Your Forked Lightning and Arm of Thorim now marks enemies for 6 sec. 

Your Call Lightning against marked enemies deals an additional 15% of its damage to them and nearby enemies.
Increases the duration of Arm of Thorim's stun effect by 1 sec.

Body of Lightning.baseDescription:
Depletes 25 Static
Infuse an ally with lightning for 12 seconds, regenerating 15% of their maximum mana plus 1% every 1 sec. 

While active, damage dealt deals an additional 75 + 15% nature SP Nature damage to nearby enemies

modifyingTalents.description: Your Body of Lightning now regenerates 1% additional maximum mana per tick.
Reduces the cooldown of your Body of Lightning by -30 sec.
Increases the duration of your Stormcloak, Conjure Storm and Body of Lightning by 30%.
Your Body of Lightning is now automatically cast on you when you cast it on an ally.
Dealing direct spell damage now has a 33% chance to reduce the cast time of your next Call Lightning by -15% for 10 seconds, stacking 2 times.
Increases the critical strike chance of Call Lightning and Arm of Thorim by 30% against targets affected by your Volt.
Increases the damage of your Shock, Call Lightning, and Arm of Thorim by 20%.
Increases the spell power scaling of Shock, Call Lightning, and Arm of Thorim by 30%.
Casting Call Lightning or Electrocute now reduces the cooldown of Arm of Thorim and Lightning Cage by -1.5 sec.

Your Forked Lightning and Arm of Thorim now marks enemies for 6 sec. 

Your Call Lightning against marked enemies deals an additional 15% of its damage to them and nearby enemies.

Storm Ascendance now additionally grants you Lord of Lightning for 20 seconds.Lord of LightningIncreases the damage dealt by Forked Lightning, Call Lightning, and Electrocute by an additional 30% and allows Electrocute to strike 3 additional enemies.

Casting Call Lightning now increases the critical strike chance of party and raid members by 5% for 10 seconds.

Does not stack with similar effects.
Casting Call Lightning now refreshes a charge of Gale.
Command your Air Elemental to windsurf to you, intercepting the next melee or ranged attack made against you, and allowing you to cast Shock and Call Lightning while moving for 15 seconds.
Increases the effectiveness of Call of the Winds and Call of the Storm by 20%.
Increases the effectiveness of Call of the Winds and Call of the Storm by 20%.

Clear Skies.baseDescription:
Increases chance to hit with all spells and attacks by 1% for you and party and raid members.

Does not stack with similar effects.

Cloudburst.baseDescription: Create a mighty gust of wind that knocks away all nearby enemies.

modifyingTalents.description: Reduces the cooldown of Gale Guard and Cloudburst by -5 sec.
Reduces the cooldown of your Cloudburst and Windsurf by -20%.
Your Conduction now has a -25% chance to not consume Conductive.

Attempt to drown an enemy, reducing their healing received by -20% for 8 seconds. At the end of the duration, unleash a creature from the depths dealing cond(gt(SPFR, SPN), 83+0+SPFR*1, 83+0+SPN*1) Frost Damage.

Each time you generate a stack of Conductive you increase their damage taken from this effect, stacking up to 5 times.
Damage dealt by Deluge is increased by 5% for each stack of Conductive.

Casting a spell that consumes Conductive now grants you a stack of Kinetic Energy.Kinetic EnergyCritical strike chance increased by 2%, stacking 3 times, for 10 seconds.

Additional applications do not refresh the duration.

Level 50 Passive
Your Electrocute is now affected by Conductive, increasing its damage by 10% per stack.
Your Conduction now has a -25% chance to not consume Conductive.

Conductor In Charge.baseDescription:
Increases all damage dealt by party and raid members by 3% and your Frost damage dealt by 5%.

Does not stack with similar effects.

modifyingTalents.description: Your Conjure Storm now refunds 10 Static.
Increases the duration of your Stormcloak, Conjure Storm and Body of Lightning by 30%.
Increases the critical strike chance of Shock, Conjure Storm, and Eye of the Storm by 8%.
Increases the tick rate of Conjure Storm by -25%.

Dark Skies.baseDescription:
When your direct damage spells fail to critically strike, your critical strike chance is increased by 2% for 10 seconds, stacking up to 5 times.

Critically striking removes this effect.

modifyingTalents.description: Damage dealt by Deluge is increased by 5% for each stack of Conductive.

Depletes All Static
Call down a terrible beam of lightning upon an enemy, dealing 135 + 120% nature SP Nature damage and stunning them for 1 seconds.

Depletes All Static
Encase yourself in an electrical shield, removing and making you immune to all physical attacks and spells for 10 seconds.

Cannot generate Static for the duration.
Casting Discharge now restores 5% more mana.
Casting Discharge now increases your movement speed by 20% for 6 seconds, stacking 2 times.

Depletes 40 Static
Infuse yourself with lightning and blink forward a long distance, dealing 540 + 50% SP Nature damage to all enemies in your path.

Scales with modifiers to Discharge
Increases your critical strike chance by 15% against enemies affected by Drown.
Increases the critical strike chance of Drown by 50%.
Reduces the cooldown of Drown by -15 sec.

Critical strikes with Torrential Wrath now spawn an Electrified Water Elemental to aid you in combat for 20 sec.

When an Electrified Water Elemental dissipates, the cooldown of your Drown is reduced by -1.5 sec.

Your direct critical strikes against an enemy affected by Drown spawn an Electrified Water Elemental to aid you in combat for 20 seconds.

When an Electrified Water Elemental dissipates, the cooldown of your Drown is reduced by -1.5 sec.

Electrifying Aura.baseDescription:
Increases critical strike chance of all party and raid members by 3%.

Does not stack with similar effects.

modifyingTalents.description:
Level 10 Passive
Dealing spell damage now has a 5% chance to grant you Electrocutioner.Electrocutioner (Proc)Resets the cooldown of Electrocute and makes your next usable regardless of the target's health percentage.

Chance increases based on Static level.

Level 30 Passive
While Electrocutioner is active, your Electrocute now gains 20% increased damage.
Your Electrocute now has a 25% chance to strike again.
Increases the damage and critical strike chance of Electrocute by 20%.
Damage dealt by Electrocute and Arm of Thorim now increase the target's chance to be critically hit by spells by 3% for 10 seconds.
Casting Call Lightning or Electrocute now reduces the cooldown of Arm of Thorim and Lightning Cage by -1.5 sec.
Increases the critical damage of Electrocute by 30%.

Storm Ascendance now additionally grants you Lord of Lightning for 20 seconds.Lord of LightningIncreases the damage dealt by Forked Lightning, Call Lightning, and Electrocute by an additional 30% and allows Electrocute to strike 3 additional enemies.
Dealing Frost damage now has a 60% chance to increase the damage the target takes from Electrocute by 15% for 10 seconds, stacking up to 4 times.
Increases the critical damage of your Torrential Wrath and Electrocute by 30%.
Increases the critical strike chance of Electrocute by 60% against enemies below 20% health.

Level 40 Passive
Your Electrocute can now be used while channeling Stormflow.

Level 50 Passive
Your Electrocute is now affected by Conductive, increasing its damage by 10% per stack.
Casting Shock, Gale or Electrocute now reduces the remaining cooldown of your Kiss of the Clouds by -1 sec.

Level 30 Passive
While Electrocutioner is active, your Electrocute now gains 20% increased damage.
Instantly resets the cooldown of your Evacuate, Windsurf, and Unshackle.

Exhale.baseDescription:
Depletes 20 Static
Release the pressure from nearby allies, dispelling 1 movement slowing effect, repeating every 3 sec for 9 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description:
Emanate an aura around you for 15 seconds, causing allied players within 100 yds to deal 70% nature SP additional damage as Nature damage when they deal direct damage.

Applies Exhaustion, preventing you from benefiting from similar effects for 1 minute.

Eye of the Storm.baseDescription:
Mark an enemy for 4 seconds. Every 1 sec, enemies near them take cond(gt(SPFR, SPN), 11+0+SPFR*0.42, 11+0+SPN*0.42) Nature damage.

At the end of the duration, enemies near them also take cond(gt(SPFR, SPN), 42+0+SPFR*0.64, 42+0+SPN*0.64) Nature damage and are rooted for 4 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Shock, Conjure Storm, and Eye of the Storm by 8%.
While rooted by Eye of the Storm, affected enemies now take 30% increased damage from you.
Reduces the cooldown and mana cost of Eye of the Storm by -30%.

Fog.baseDescription:
Concentrate elemental magic to create an 8 yd wide cloudy barrier at your feet for 8 seconds.

Enemies are unable to target into or out of the Fog.

modifyingTalents.description: Your Forked Lightning now affects 1 additional enemy.

Damage dealt by Forked Lightning now has a 20% chance to spread an active Volt on your target to each affected enemy.

Chance increases based on Static level.

Your Forked Lightning and Arm of Thorim now marks enemies for 6 sec. 

Your Call Lightning against marked enemies deals an additional 15% of its damage to them and nearby enemies.

Storm Ascendance now additionally grants you Lord of Lightning for 20 seconds.Lord of LightningIncreases the damage dealt by Forked Lightning, Call Lightning, and Electrocute by an additional 30% and allows Electrocute to strike 3 additional enemies.

Damage dealt by Forked Lightning has a 5% chance to transform it into Thunder Wave.Thunder Wave (Spell)Bring lightning down upon an enemy and nearby enemies, dealing 206 + 65% arcane SP Spellstorm Damage and refreshing the duration of Volt on enemies struck.

Deals 30% increased damage to enemies affected by Volt.

Gale.baseDescription:
3 Charges, 10 sec recharge
Generates 20 Static
Blast an enemy and up to 2 nearby enemies with a powerful gust of wind for 53 + 42% nature SP Nature damage.

modifyingTalents.description: Casting Call Lightning now refreshes a charge of Gale.
Increases the critical strike chance of Gale by 15%.
Casting Gale now reduces the cooldown of abilities that deplete Static by -1 sec.

Using Torrential Wrath on an enemy affected by Stormcloud causes a Geyser to erupt beneath them, dealing 571 + 25% frost SP Frost damage and knocking them up slightly.
Reduces your total threat generated by -30% and increases the range of Gust of Wind by 3 yds.

Hydro Powered.baseDescription: Increases your spell critical damage by 35%.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Invigorating Surge by 40%.

Invigorating Winds.baseDescription: Envelop an ally in invigorating winds, granting them immunity to silence and interrupt effects and causes them to take no pushback from damaging attacks for 20 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Your Invigoration now stacks 5 additional times.
Increases the duration of Invigoration by 10 sec.
Increases the damage gained per stack of Invigoration by 2%.

Ionic Aura.baseDescription: Increases the maximum mana, Rage, Energy, Focus, and Runic Power of allies within 40 yds by 3%.

Kiss of the Clouds.baseDescription:
Depletes 40 Static
Grant all party and raid members a shield that absorbs 101 + 100% Intellect damage, scaling with Intellect, for 10 seconds.

While active, the target suffers no spell pushback from taking damage.

modifyingTalents.description:
Casting Kiss of the Clouds now empowers your Air Elemental with Gift of Air for 30 seconds.

In addition, your critical strikes now extend the duration of your Tailwind by 1.5 sec.
Gift of AirIncreases damage dealt by 20%, spell haste by 15%, and heals for 13.75 every 2 sec.

Increases the base amount absorbed by your Kiss of the Clouds by 100%.
While Lightning Cage is active your Magic Damage taken is now reduced by -25% and you are unable to be hit by ranged attacks.
Casting Call Lightning or Electrocute now reduces the cooldown of Arm of Thorim and Lightning Cage by -1.5 sec.

Mystic Thunder.baseDescription:
Interrupt the target's current spell cast and then mark them for 5 seconds.

If they cast again while marked they are silenced for 3 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description:
Your direct damage dealt now has a 25% chance to summon a Power Sphere that will move towards your target. Can only have 1 Power Sphere up at a time.

Power Sphere will redirect its movement towards enemies you cast Stormflow on.

Upon reaching the target, it deals cond(gt(SPA, SPN), 697+33+SPA*0.485, 697+33+SPN*0.485) Spellstorm Damage to them and enemies within 5 yds.

Residual Power.baseDescription: Reduces your Magic damage taken by -10%.

Shock can be instantly cast while channeling.

Damage dealt by Shock is now increased by 15% while channeling Stormflow.

Cover yourself in a barrier of volatile energy for 15 seconds, causing all attacks against you to have a 50% chance to deal half damage and generate 10 Static.

Transform into a storm elemental for 15 seconds, increasing your Magic damage dealt by 20% and reducing your Magic damage taken by -50%.

Generates 50 Static
Ascend into the air and cage yourself in lightning for 30 seconds, locking yourself in place.

While inside the cage, damaging spells generate 20 Static and their range is doubled.

Damage dealt by Forked Lightning now has a 20% chance to spread an active Volt on your target to each affected enemy.

Chance increases based on Static level.
Direct critical strikes with Static spenders now refund 10 Static.
Standing still grants you Electrical Charge every second, increasing your haste by 1%. Upon reaching 20 stacks, your spells dont deplete Static for 10 seconds, after which the charges are depleted.

Depletes All Static
Encase yourself in an electrical shield, removing and making you immune to all physical attacks and spells for 10 seconds.

Level 40 Passive
Increases your Nature spell penetration by 20, scaling with your level.

In addition, Stormbreaker now dispels 1 additional magic effect.
While Stormcloak is active your Armor is now increased by 500% of your Intellect.

Increases the damage of Torrential Wrath and Stormflow by 30%.

Level 30 Passive

Your direct damage critical strikes cause your Stormflow to tick -20% faster for 3 seconds.

Level 40 Passive
Your Electrocute can now be used while channeling Stormflow.
While channeling Stormflow, your Shock now strikes 1 additional target at 75% value.

Power Sphere will redirect its movement towards enemies you cast Stormflow on.

Upon reaching the target, it deals cond(gt(SPA, SPN), 697+33+SPA*0.485, 697+33+SPN*0.485) Spellstorm Damage to them and enemies within 5 yds.

Depletes 50 Static
Summon a flurry of rain, wind, and lightning from the sky for 20 seconds. Every 2 sec, enemies within 30 yds of the caster are zapped with lightning, dealing 540 + 55% nature SP Nature damage.

modifyingTalents.description: Read from your ancient lexicon, causing your next Summon: Air Elemental to be instant cast and cost no mana. Lasts 15 seconds.

Tempest's Call.baseDescription:
Bring the power of wind and storm to all nearby allies, increasing haste by 30% for 20 seconds.

After being affected by this spell, allies cannot benefit from similar effects for 5 minutes.

Thunder Grip.baseDescription: Direct damage dealt now has a 30% chance to apply Thunder Grip to enemies.Thunder GripPrevents enemies from mounting, fleeing, and increasing their movement speed above normal movement speed for 8 seconds.

Thunderous.baseDescription:

Increases the critical damage of your spells by 150%.

Waterfall.baseDescription: Dealing critical damage now reduces all of your cooldowns by -0.5 sec.

Whirling Maelstrom.baseDescription:
Level 20 Passive
Increases your spell haste by 20% of your Intellect.

modifyingTalents.description:
Transforms your Whirlpool into Raging Zephyr.Raging Zephyr3 Charges, 35 sec recharge
Summon a Raging Zephyr at the targeted location for 12 seconds.

Every 4 sec, it will pull all enemies within 10 yds inside of it.

Wicked Storms.baseDescription: Increases your Nature damage dealt by 5%.

modifyingTalents.description:
Place a Wind Gate at target location for 1 minute. 

You may cast Wind Gate: Evacuate on an ally to pull them to your Wind Gate.

Wind Shift.baseDescription: Increases your spell haste by 4% and reduces spell pushback suffered from damaging attacks by 50%.

Windrunner.baseDescription: The wind is always at your back, pushing you to move faster, increasing your movement speed and mounted movement speed by 15%.
